channel.title: Lumia on Tech Tracker
channel.description: Recent content in Lumia on Tech Tracker

item.title: The rise and fall of Nokia.
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-0TzI9EThbHE/YuBFZkWpoYI/AAAAAAAAMuI/ATSoDleFbC8tnhasvi8IODx-8ZAUYAMRwCNcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1658864973831843-0.png" alt=""> On planet earth humans since ancient times wanted to communicate with each other from long distances to make that happen many human intellectuals found numerous ways at first humans used to travel by walk and meet fellow humans to talk with them but it’s not easy as they can’t always physically go to particular destination to communicate with fellow humans as there is no option they depended on it.
